aws.name: Macie enabled for PII data discovery
aws.expected: Amazon Macie enabled and actively discovering PII in S3 buckets
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon Macie to discover and classify PII in S3 buckets.

aws.name: S3 buckets tagged with data classification
aws.expected: S3 buckets containing PII tagged with appropriate data classification
aws.remediation: Tag S3 buckets with data classification tags indicating PII content.

aws.name: RDS databases tagged with data classification
aws.expected: RDS instances containing PII tagged with data classification
aws.remediation: Tag RDS databases with data classification indicating PII content.

azure.name: Microsoft Purview enabled for data discovery
azure.expected: Microsoft Purview actively scanning for PII data
azure.remediation: Enable Microsoft Purview to discover and classify PII data.

azure.name: Storage accounts tagged with data classification
azure.expected: Storage accounts containing PII tagged with data classification
azure.remediation: Tag storage accounts with data classification indicating PII content.

azure.name: SQL databases tagged with data classification
azure.expected: SQL databases containing PII tagged with data classification
azure.remediation: Tag Azure SQL databases with data classification indicating PII content.

gcp.name: Cloud DLP enabled for PII discovery
gcp.expected: Cloud DLP jobs actively scanning for PII data
gcp.remediation: Enable Cloud Data Loss Prevention to discover and classify PII.

gcp.name: Storage buckets labeled with data classification
gcp.expected: Storage buckets containing PII labeled with data classification
gcp.remediation: Label Cloud Storage buckets with data classification indicating PII content.

gcp.name: BigQuery datasets labeled with data classification
gcp.expected: BigQuery datasets containing PII labeled with data classification
gcp.remediation: Label BigQuery datasets with data classification indicating PII content.

aws.name: Resources tagged with data processing purpose
aws.expected: Resources processing PII tagged with purpose tags
aws.remediation: Tag resources with data processing purpose metadata.

azure.expected: Resources processing PII tagged with purpose metadata
azure.remediation: Tag Azure resources with data processing purpose metadata.

gcp.remediation: Label GCP resources with data processing purpose metadata.
